extensions.name: XJY's blocked words
extensions.description: Makes it easier for you to manage blocked words, suitable for chat features

extensions.name: 哈希助手
extensions.description: 提供一些哈希函数，包括SHA-1、SHA-256、CRC32和HMAC-SHA256，用于数据完整性的验证。
